revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-4-215

Vernier pointer (in Decca)

The pointer, on the lane identification meter, which indicates in turn the correct lane number for comparison with the appropriate Decometer.

The vernier pointer is in the form of a six-pointed star and the reading is taken from the arm contained in the sector pointer.

{{IALAFooter}}
